info.name: EMS Auth API
info.description:
JWT authentication endpoints for EMS.

Includes request bodies, required headers, and sample responses.

request.description: Register a new user with default employee role. No token is returned; login is required to get a JWT token.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Authenticate user and return access token.
Return authenticated user details.
Refresh JWT token and return new token payload.
Invalidate current token (blacklist).
Returns users with employee role that are not assigned to employees table.
List users with search, role, status filters and pagination. Admin only.
Get one user by UUID. Admin only.
Create a user as admin.
Update a user. Password is optional.
Delete a user by UUID. Admin cannot delete self.
List employees with filtering and pagination. Admin and manager only.
Show one employee.
Create an employee.
Update an employee.
Delete an employee.
List departments with search, status filter and pagination.
Show department details with paginated employees list.
Create a department with optional manager assignment.
Update department details and manager assignment.
Delete department by UUID.
List salary records with employee/date filtering and pagination.
Get salary record by UUID.
Create salary record. net_salary is calculated on backend.
Update salary record.
Delete salary record.
Get salary history for a specific employee (latest first).
Employee applies for leave. Only employee role is allowed.
List leaves. Employee sees own leaves only; manager/admin can see all with filters.
Show leave by UUID.
Update pending leave request by owning employee only.
Cancel pending leave request by owning employee only.
Approve pending leave. Manager/Admin only.
Reject pending leave. Manager/Admin only.
Employee check-in. Creates one attendance record per day with auto date/time and status.
Employee check-out. Requires same-day check-in first.
List attendance records. Manager/Admin only.
Show attendance record by UUID. Manager/Admin only.
Get attendance history for employee. Manager/Admin only.
Employee summary report (admin/manager only).
Department distribution report with manager info and employee counts.
Attendance summary with date/employee/department filters.
Salary distribution metrics with aggregate payroll values.
Leave statistics report with status breakdown and average leave duration.
Dashboard-level overview KPIs and latest entities.
